test_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository --with pytest pytest repository/tests/p4/test_recovery_state_model.py repository/tests/p4/test_resume_decisions.py repository/tests/p4/test_review_recovery.py repository/tests/p4/test_lock_rebuild_requests.py repository/tests/p4/test_recovery_invalidation.py

syntax_checks.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository python -m drd_harness.cli.main runtime-boundary-check repository/src
